name: engineering-workflows
description: Engineering workflow skills for brainstorming, adversarial design review, building, TDD, diagnosis, architecture review, codebase orientation, and visual presentation artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Brainstorm, stress-test, build, diagnose, test, review, and visualize work.
interface.longDescription: Workflow skills for evidence-backed brainstorming, adversarial design review, pragmatic building, disciplined debugging, test-driven development, architecture review, high-level codebase orientation, and temporary visual presentation artifacts. Adapted skills preserve source attribution in Agent Skills frontmatter metadata.
defaultPrompt: Use $engineering-workflows:grill-me to stress-test this approach through adversarial questioning.
Use $engineering-workflows:improve-codebase-architecture to review this codebase architecture.
Use $engineering-workflows:visualize to turn this session into a visual report.
